name: swift-strict
description: Swift/SwiftUI strictness, clean code, and security rules. Use when writing, reviewing, or refactoring Swift code in iOS/macOS projects. Covers force unwrap prevention, @Observable vs ObservableObject patterns, access control, concurrency safety (@MainActor, actors, Sendable), error handling with typed enums, memory leak prevention, guard-first style, and naming conventions. Derived from production iOS apps.
